name: Prometheus
description: Prometheus, a Cloud Native Computing Foundation project, is a systems and service monitoring system. It collects metrics from configured targets at given intervals, evaluates rule expressions, displays the results, and can trigger alerts when specified conditions are observed. Important: the data directory mounted to /prometheus must be writable by the container user (commonly uid/gid 65534). If Prometheus fails with 'open /prometheus/queries.active: permission denied', fix the host directory ownership/permissions before starting.

paths.name: Prometheus Config
paths.description: Directory for prometheus.yml and optional additional configuration files.

paths.name: Prometheus Data
paths.description: Prometheus persistent time-series database. Host directory must be writable by the container user; if needed run e.g. 'chown -R 65534:65534 /mnt/cache/appdata/prometheus/data'.
